description: It's incredible because our legal team is always needing an email from years ago or something and we can actually find it.
author: Patrick H.
pros: It keeps every email sent to/from the company in one place where you can find any deleted email or even folder structure.
cons: Searching can be a little frustrating at first.

author: Cristian G.
pros: Simple to set up, SSO with Microsoft 365. The support is extremely responsive
cons: automatic synchronization of permissions on shared mailboxes is missing

author: Bibiana B.
pros: Easy to use, easy to propose , support received
cons: nothing to report for this item ........

description: The experience was good in overall. We can use this product in order to grant a reliable service to our customers as a service provider
author: Fabio F.
pros: The Easy of Use and the possibility to use the product as an MSP
cons: Not many cons about the product, maybe the configuration from email provider side is the thing that I like least

author: Andrea F.
pros: Very complete archive system and with legal value.
cons: It would be nice have a iso solution to deploy and not just a virtual appliance.

review_title: Our reference architecture for Email Archiving.
description: The greatest challenge our customers were having was a GDPR-compliant and privacy-driven solution allowing the permanent archival of inbound & outbound email for current and former employees: LibraESVA Email Archiver delivered an easy to use and scalable system which had management, IT and users happy.
author: Giulio B.
pros: The product integrates seamlessly with every kind of email server be it cloud based or on premises.
cons: Authentication and authorization options could be improved to include better delegation options especially for legacy IMAP email providers.

review_title: Good features and performance, and support
description: Full-featured software, very intuitive to use, very good support
author: Claudio T.
pros: Full-featured software, very intuitive to use, very good support
cons: No critical issues to report at now. It would be great if the deletion of inboxes were improved, which now has to be done in two steps

description: Users are happy and the DPO too, do you need more?
author: Riccardo P.
pros: - ease of use- stellar technical support- super fast search function (34 million e-mail archived)
cons: sometimes is a little slow (5 - 10 sec.)in retrieving the older e-mail body

author: Fabrizio Z.
pros: Users can search and retrieve archived emails quickly and easily using various search criteria such as sender, recipient, date range, keywords, and more. This can be a time-saving feature for users who need to locate specific emails from the archive.
cons: Users who are new to the system or less technically inclined may require some time and training to fully grasp its features and functionalities.

author: Marco O.
pros: Simplicity and flexibility in configuration. The ease with which end users can master the tool.
cons: There were no particular problems to indicate

author: Michele M.
pros: Semplicità di utilizzo da parte dell'utente finale.
cons: La impossibilità di utilizzare l'archiver come strumento per inviare o ricevere le pec.

author: Marco M.
pros: Full set of options that fit all needs; enterprise grade scale.
cons: Would like to have a simpliest interface

review_title: Libraesva Email Archiver: a good solution for email archiving
author: Stefano B.
pros: Simple set-upComplex searches made easyCertified time-stamping of each archived email (RFC3161)Privacy officer management: access to sensitive data can be subject to approval
cons: No integration with HCL Domino through API

review_title: a great tool for legal support
description: excellent performance, great reliability, simple installation, extreme versatility
author: Davide G.
pros: Easily retrieving all relevant email in a search and save them in a PDF, printable format
cons: no other features are needed at the moment
